name: ComicVine API
description: ComicVine is the largest comic book database in the world, providing comprehensive data on comic book characters, issues, volumes, publishers, story arcs, teams, and more. It covers DC Comics, Marvel, and all other publishers. The API provides read-only access to this data, requiring an API key for authentication.
